transactions.desc: The Red Sox designated Coulombe for assignment following Saturday's 4-0 win over the Mets, Chris Cotillo of MassLive.com reports.
The Orioles reinstated Hiraldo (shoulder) from the 60-day injured list and optioned him to Triple-A Norfolk, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.
The Dodgers designated Barnes for assignment Saturday.
The Dodgers optioned Hurt to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Saturday.
The Dodgers reinstated Knack (chest) from the 60-day injured list Saturday.
The Padres reinstated Waldron (forearm) from the injured list Saturday.
The Padres optioned Brito to Triple-A El Paso on Saturday.
The Cubs designated Woodford for assignment Saturday, Patrick Mooney of The Athletic reports.
The Cubs reinstated Maton (knee) from the injured list Saturday, Patrick Mooney of The Athletic reports.
Murdock was added to the active roster as Pittsburgh's 27th man for Saturday's doubleheader against Milwaukee.
The Pirates optioned Brannigan to Triple-A Indianapolis on Saturday.
The Pirates optioned Harrington to Triple-A Indianapolis on Saturday.
The Pirates activated Gonzalez to the major-league roster Saturday.
The Rockies recalled Criswell from Triple-A Albuquerque on Saturday.
The Rockies optioned Shook to Triple-A Albuquerque on Saturday.
The Tigers claimed Granillo off waivers from the Nationals on Saturday and optioned him to Triple-A Toledo.
Atlanta optioned Karinchak to Triple-A Gwinnett on Saturday.
Atlanta recalled Murphy from Triple-A Gwinnett on Saturday.
Atlanta recalled Hicklen from Triple-A Gwinnett on Saturday.
The Red Sox optioned Harris to Triple-A Worcester on Saturday.
The Red Sox recalled Rivera from Triple-A Worcester on Saturday.
The Twins claimed Anderson off waivers from the Red Sox on Saturday, Ari Alexander of 7 News Boston reports.
The Athletics recalled Serven from Triple-A Las Vegas on Saturday.
The Twins optioned Orze to Triple-A St. Paul on Saturday, Aaron Gleeman of AaronGleeman.com reports.
The White Sox recalled Schweitzer from Triple-A Charlotte on Saturday.
The Brewers recalled Gasser from Triple-A Nashville on Saturday.
The Pirates designated Sanders for assignment Saturday, Alex Stumpf of MLB.com reports.
The Chicago White Sox traded LHP Brandon Eisert to the Pittsburgh Pirates.
The Chicago White Sox traded INF Jacob Gonzalez to the Pittsburgh Pirates.
The Pittsburgh Pirates traded LHP Jaden Woods to the Chicago White Sox.
